notableEvents.label: Donovan Walton GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Donovan Walton grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Denzer Guzman out at 2nd. Donovan Walton out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
